title: REAP Named to the Railbelt Reliability Council Implementation Committee
summary: REAP Named to the Railbelt Reliability Council Implementation Committee In mid-July, REAP Executive Director Chris Rose was named as an unaffiliated member of the 14-person Railbelt Reliability Council Implementation Committee (RRC-IC). Since that time, the RRC-IC has begun meeting on a weekly basis...

title: COVID-19 Response at Red Dog Operations
summary: Teck and NANA were notified today of a positive COVID-19 test for a Teck Alaska employee at the Port site. Red Dog is following established response protocols to ensure the health and safety of all personnel at Red Dog Operations is maintained. Information regarding travel and testing: A positive test result was received today for one of the six employees who was quarantined at Port...
